issue_title: [6.3] [Bugfix] Fixed issue where thumbnail panel was the wrong size after full screen
issue_body_preview: The issue occurs when you load a document with enough pages to get a scroll bar in the page thumbnails panel, open the page thumbnails panel, full-screen WebViewer, and then exit full-screen. The inner thumbnail panel will be slightly longer than expected and the bottom of the panel will be offscree
test_description_zh:
1. 打开一个页数足够多、缩略图面板能出现滚动条的文档
2. 打开左侧页面缩略图面板
3. 将 WebViewer 切换为全屏模式
4. 退出全屏模式
5. 观察缩略图面板的尺寸是否正常显示
expected_result_zh: 退出全屏后，缩略图面板应正确适配容器高度，面板底部完全可见且不会超出屏幕/容器范围，滚动条正常工作，无内容溢出或被截断的情况
